info.title: Agent App API
info.description: Agent apps expose a streaming service API for production integrations. Use the API key created from the Agent app API Access page. Public service API requests use the returned API base URL and do not include the Agent ID in the path; the API key identifies the backing app.

servers.description: Base URL of the Agent App API. Use the Service API Base URL shown in the Agent app API Access page. For self-hosted deployments, replace it with your own API base URL.

api_base_url.description: Host and path of the API base URL, without the `https://` prefix.

post.description: Send a user message to an Agent app. Agent apps use streaming responses only and may return message chunks, agent reasoning/tool events, generated files, and a final `message_end` event.

requestBody.description: Request body to send an Agent app message.

value.query: Summarize the attached product feedback and suggest next steps.

200.description: Successful streaming response. Agent apps return `text/event-stream` Server-Sent Events. Blocking JSON responses are not supported for Agent apps.

schema.description:
A stream of Server-Sent Events (SSE).

**Parsing**: Each event is a line prefixed with `data: ` followed by a JSON object, terminated by `\n\n`. Strip the `data: ` prefix before parsing the JSON, then read the `event` field to determine the event type. Ignore `ping` events, which arrive as `event: ping` lines (no `data:` payload) every 10 seconds to keep the connection alive.

**Stream lifecycle**: The reply streams as `message` events (Chatbot apps), or as `agent_thought` and `agent_message` events (Agent apps), and ends with `message_end`. When text-to-speech auto-play is enabled, `tts_message` events interleave and `tts_message_end` becomes the final event.

**Events**: Apart from `ping`, every event includes `conversation_id`, `message_id`, and `created_at` (Unix epoch seconds); all but `error` also include `task_id`.

**Reply events**

| Event | App | Fires on | Key fields |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| `message` | Chatbot | each answer chunk (concatenate in order) | `answer` |
| `agent_message` | Agent | each answer chunk (concatenate in order) | `answer` |
| `agent_thought` | Agent | each reasoning or tool-call step | `position`, `thought`, `tool`, `tool_input` (JSON), `observation`, `message_files` |
| `message_replace` | Chatbot, Agent | output moderation replaces the answer so far | `answer` |
| `message_file` | Chatbot, Agent | the assistant returns a file | `type`, `belongs_to`, `url` |
| `message_end` | Chatbot, Agent | the answer is complete | `metadata` (`usage`, `retriever_resources`) |
| `tts_message`, `tts_message_end` | Chatbot, Agent | audio chunk / end, when TTS auto-play is on | `audio` |

**Transport events**

| Event | App | Fires on | Key fields |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| `error` | Chatbot, Agent | a failure ends the stream; HTTP stays `200` | `status` (e.g. `400`), `code` (e.g. `invalid_param`), `message` |
| `ping` | Chatbot, Agent | keep-alive every 10 seconds | none |

streamingResponseAgent.value: data: {"event": "agent_thought", "id": "agent_thought_id_1", "task_id": "task123", "message_id": "msg123", "conversation_id": "conv123", "position": 1, "thought": "Thinking about calling a tool...", "tool": "dalle3", "tool_input": "{\"dalle3\": {\"prompt\": \"a cute cat\"}}", "created_at": 1705395332} data: {"event": "message_file", "task_id": "task123", "message_id": "msg123", "conversation_id": "conv123", "id": "file_id_1", "type": "image", "belongs_to": "assistant", "url": "https://example.com/cat.png", "created_at": 1705395332} data: {"event": "agent_message", "task_id": "task123", "message_id": "msg123", "conversation_id": "conv123", "answer": "Here is the image: ", "created_at": 1705395333} data: {"event": "message_end", "task_id":"task123", "message_id": "msg123", "conversation_id": "conv123", "metadata": {"usage": {"total_tokens": 50, "latency": 2.5}}}

400.description:
- `app_unavailable` : App unavailable or misconfigured.
- `not_chat_app` : App mode does not match the API route.
- `conversation_completed` : The conversation has ended.
- `provider_not_initialize` : No valid model provider credentials found.
- `provider_quota_exceeded` : Model provider quota exhausted.
- `model_currently_not_support` : Current model unavailable.
- `completion_request_error` : Text generation failed.

value.message: App unavailable, please check your app configurations.
Please check if your app mode matches the right API route.
The conversation has ended. Please start a new conversation.
No valid model provider credentials found. Please go to Settings -> Model Provider to complete your provider credentials.
Your quota for Dify Hosted OpenAI has been exhausted. Please go to Settings -> Model Provider to complete your own provider credentials.
Dify Hosted OpenAI trial currently not support the GPT-4 model.
Completion request failed.
Conversation Not Exists.

429.description:
- `too_many_requests` : Too many concurrent requests for this app.
- `rate_limit_error` : The upstream model provider rate limit was exceeded.

value.message: Too many requests. Please try again later.
Rate Limit Error
Internal server error.

post.description: Stop a running Agent app streaming task.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Task ID returned by the Send Agent App Message streaming response.

user.description: User identifier, must be consistent with the user passed in the send message interface.

400.description: `not_chat_app` : App mode does not match the API route.

value.message: Please check if your app mode matches the right API route.

post.description: Upload a file for an Agent app conversation. Use the returned `id` as `upload_file_id` in the `files` array when calling Send Agent App Message. Uploaded files are scoped to the same `user` value.

file.description: The file to be uploaded. Supported types include images, documents, audio, and video.

user.description: Identifier for the end user, defined by your application's rules and unique within the app. Service API and WebApp user IDs are separate, even when identical.

400.description:
- `no_file_uploaded` : No file was provided in the request.
- `too_many_files` : Only one file is allowed per request.
- `filename_not_exists_error` : The uploaded file has no filename.

value.message: Please upload your file.
Only one file is allowed.
The specified filename does not exist.
File size exceeded.
File type not allowed.

get.description: Return historical messages for an Agent app conversation in reverse chronological order. Use the same `user` value that created the conversation.

parameters.name: first_id
parameters.description: The ID of the first chat record on the current page. Default is `null` (fetches the latest messages). For subsequent pages, use the ID of the first message from the current list to get older messages.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of chat history messages to return per request.

data.query: What are the specs of the iPhone 13 Pro Max?
data.answer: iPhone 13 Pro Max specs are listed here:...

400.description: `not_chat_app` : App mode does not match the API route.

value.message: Please check if your app mode matches the right API route.

404.description:
- `not_found` : Conversation does not exist.
- `not_found` : First message does not exist.

value.message: Conversation Not Exists.
First Message Not Exists.

get.description: Return Agent app conversations for the specified end user, ordered by most recently active.

parameters.name: last_id
parameters.description: The ID of the last record on the current page (for pagination).

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sorting field. Use '-' prefix for descending order.

data.name: iPhone Specs Chat
data.introduction: Welcome! How can I help you today?

400.description: `not_chat_app` : App mode does not match the API route.

value.message: Please check if your app mode matches the right API route.
Last Conversation Not Exists.

get.description: Retrieve basic information for the Agent app identified by the API key.
Retrieve Agent app input parameters. For Agent apps, the `user_input_form` field is projected from variables configured in the Agent Soul.

value.opening_statement: Hello! How can I help you today?

value.message: App unavailable, please check your app configurations.

get.description: Retrieve Agent app metadata, including tool icons and other runtime display metadata.

ApiKeyAuth.description: API Key authentication. For all API requests, include your API Key in the `Authorization` HTTP Header, prefixed with `Bearer `. Example: `Authorization: Bearer {API_KEY}`. **Strongly recommend storing your API Key on the server-side, not shared or stored on the client-side, to avoid possible API-Key leakage that can lead to serious consequences.**

RetrieverResource.description: Citation and attribution information for a retriever resource.

id.description: Unique ID of the retriever resource.

message_id.description: ID of the message this resource belongs to.

position.description: Position of the resource in the list.

segment_id.description: ID of the specific chunk within the document.

hit_count.description: Number of times this chunk was hit.

segment_position.description: Position of the chunk within the document.

created_by.description: ID of the user who uploaded the file.

ConversationMessageItem.description: A single message in a conversation.

parent_message_id.description: Parent message ID for threaded conversations.

status.description: Message status. `normal` for successful messages, `error` when generation failed.

rating.description: Feedback rating. `like` for positive, `dislike` for negative.

retriever_resources.description: Retriever resources used for this message.

extra_contents.description: Additional execution content associated with this message, such as human input form data.

MessageFileItem.description: A file attached to a message.

transfer_method.description: Transfer method used. `remote_url` for URL-based files, `local_file` for uploaded files, `tool_file` for tool-generated files.

belongs_to.description: Who this file belongs to. `user` for user-uploaded files, `assistant` for assistant-generated files.

upload_file_id.description: Upload file ID if transferred via `local_file`.

AgentThoughtItem.description: An agent thought step in the message.

message_id.description: Unique message ID this thought belongs to.

tool_input.description: Input of tools in JSON format.

files.description: File IDs related to this thought.

mode.description: Application mode. `chat` for basic chat apps, `agent-chat` for agent-based apps, `advanced-chat` for chatflow apps.

opening_statement.description: Opening statement displayed at conversation start.

suggested_questions_after_answer.description: Configuration for suggested questions after answer.

autoPlay.description: Auto-play setting. `enabled` to auto-play audio, `disabled` to require manual play.

user_input_form.description: List of user input form elements.

image_file_size_limit.description: Maximum image file size in MB.

audio_file_size_limit.description: Maximum audio file size in MB.

video_file_size_limit.description: Maximum video file size in MB.

workflow_file_upload_limit.description: Maximum number of files for workflow file upload.

options.description: List of selectable values for this form control.

tool_icons.description: Tool icons. Keys are tool names.

ToolIconDetail.title: Emoji Icon
ToolIconDetail.description: Detail of a tool icon using emoji.

query.description: User message or task for the Agent app.

inputs.description: Values for variables configured in the Agent Soul. Call the Get Agent App Parameters API to discover expected variable names and input controls.

response_mode.description: Agent apps support streaming mode only. Set this field to `streaming` or omit it.

user.description: End-user identifier, unique within this Agent app. Conversations, messages, and uploaded files are scoped to the same `user` value.

conversation_id.description: Conversation ID to continue. Omit this field or pass an empty string to start a new conversation, then reuse the returned `conversation_id` in later requests.

files.description: Files for multimodal Agent input. To attach a local file, upload it with the Upload File API first, then pass the returned file `id` as `upload_file_id` with `transfer_method: local_file`.

transfer_method.description: Transfer method: `remote_url` for file URL, `local_file` for uploaded file.

upload_file_id.description: Uploaded file ID obtained from the [Upload File](/api-reference/files/upload-file) API (required when `transfer_method` is `local_file`).

auto_generate_name.description: Auto-generate conversation title. If `false`, use the [Rename Conversation](/api-reference/conversations/rename-conversation) API with `auto_generate: true` for async title generation.

AgentChatRequest.description: Request body for sending a message to an Agent app.

tags.name: Agent Messages
tags.description: Send Agent app messages and stop running tasks.

tags.description: Upload files for Agent app conversations.
